personal.name: Lander Joshua O. Azarcon
personal.title: Computer Engineer | Embedded Systems & Computer Vision Developer | Startup Founder
personal.bio:
Hi 👋
 I'm Lander, a Computer Engineering graduate and founder of Vision Forge. I specialize in embedded systems, computer vision, and product-driven innovation. I enjoy building hardware-software integrated systems and leading projects from prototype to validation.

current.institution: Far Eastern University Institute of Technology

achievements: Civil Service Exam (Professional Level) – 88.06 General Rating
FTIC Tamaraw Labs Startup Incubation Program Graduate

experience.company: Far Eastern University Institute of Technology Innovation Center (FTIC)
experience.description: Developed modular learning materials for Design Thinking programs. Applied affinity clustering methodologies for structured program development. Planned and executed large-scale events including Design Thinking Summit and iTam Design Jam 2025. Coordinated with stakeholders including international speakers.

experience.company: Far Eastern University Institute of Technology Innovation Center (FTIC)
experience.description: Conducted QR-based survey analytics for lounge engagement tracking. Managed reception operations and assisted technical setup for events. Prepared 3D models and supported 3D printing operations.

Founded and led a product-focused technology startup incubated under FTIC Tamaraw Labs. Designed multifunctional drafting stationery eliminating the need for a T-square. Conducted 50+ user validation interviews, refined prototypes, filed intellectual property documents, and completed incubation phase.
Managed harvesting, sorting, and distribution. Conducted competitor marketing analysis and designed promotional materials for retailers.

certifications.name: CCNAv7: Enterprise Networking, Security, and Automation
CCNAv7: Switching, Routing, and Wireless Essentials

projects.title: Abacus GesturePRO
projects.description: A real-time finger abacus gesture recognition tutorial and assessment system using computer vision. The system tracks hand landmarks, interprets finger configurations into abacus values, provides guided tutorials, and evaluates user performance. Built with live webcam processing and structured dataset validation.

projects.title: Embedded Ultrasonic Musical Instrument
projects.description: Designed a proximity-based musical instrument using ultrasonic sensors for real-time pitch modulation. Developed Arduino firmware and custom PCB.

projects.title: Vision Forge Product Development
projects.description: Designed and validated multifunctional drafting stationery eliminating T-square usage. Conducted 50+ interviews and refined prototype through structured testing.

images.alt: Team Vision Forge at Echelon 2025 alongside Team TecHood

personality.workingStyle: I combine engineering precision with high-level experimentation and rapid validation.
personality.motivation: To build hardware-software systems that solve real-world learning and engineering problems.
